name: io.github.srinivasan-sundaresan95/orihime
title: Orihime Code Knowledge Graph
description: Cross-repository code knowledge graph for Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, and TypeScript. Indexes source code into embedded KuzuDB via tree-sitter and exposes 30+ MCP tools for call-flow tracing, taint analysis (OWASP/CWE/PCI/STIG), performance hotspot detection, and license compliance — without reading source files. 95% fewer tokens than source-reading.

ORIHIME_DB_PATH.description: Path to the KuzuDB database directory
